summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Aptus Laddered Deep Buffer ETF (ALDB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund an actively managed fund-of-funds, holding a laddered portfolio of 4 Aptus equity deep buffer ETFs, each of which has exposure to the State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trusts (SPY) capped gains and buffered losses. ALDB was launched on May 12, 2026 and is issued by Aptus Capital Advisors.

summary.pre: ETF holdings data is provided by
summary.post: . Holdings are typically published by the ETF issuer at the end of each trading day.
